description: Branch, formulate + validate the perk, and open a PR (notify to merge).
rules: merge is NEVER automatic — the agent merges on your approval
formulate composes the skill to validate
usage: Set SKILL + PERK + PERK_DESC + TOOL + BINARY (+ optional BASE). Output: pr.json.
limitation: Scaffolds a snippet STUB — you fill the perk's logic before merge.
